title: Tallon Make Your Own Christmas Advent Calendar Gift Boxes 25 Make & Fill Your Own Advent Houses Kit
features: Make & Fill Your Own Christmas Advent Calendar.

Make counting down to Christmas extra special this year with this set of make your own advent calendar houses. This set of 25 advent boxes are a great way to add your own unique touch to your festive countdown and can be enjoyed by the whole family.

This kit contains 25 small cardboard houses which are quick and easy to assemble. They come in five assorted colours, red, blue, pink, white and green. Each complete with red and white string to tie together once filled and a foiled number sticker to complete the countdown.

Each house is easy to assemble and fill and perfect for small gifts or treats such as sweets and chocolates, mini cosmetics, jewellery and much more. Once assembled, each house measures approximately 9.5cm in height x 5cm in width overall. The filling space is approximately 5cm x 5cm x 5cm.
Small and compact, these advent houses can be placed on a windowsill, fireplace, tabletop or mantelpiece, adding an extra special touch to your festive decor.
